rootCause: The build workflow lacked an explicit pull_request branch allowlist for the two long-lived base branches, and there was no aggregate guardrail validating workflow trigger coverage. This let regressions silently remove expected PR checks.
resolution: Pinned build.yml pull_request branches to main and v3, added a workflow integrity test suite that parses every workflow and enforces required trigger coverage, and introduced a new workflow-integrity aggregate workflow to fail fast whenever workflow definitions drift.
